programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and the gang are on tour, first stop: Texas. Dave is looking for love, but Texas is looking for Lil Dicky.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Back in his home town of Philadelphia, Dave grapples with his romantic origin story, both in his art and in real life.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: The tour continues in Atlanta, where an encounter with Rick Ross causes a chain reaction that requires Dave and GaTa's full attention.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Ally joins the tour to rekindle an old flame, while Dave looks to ignite a new one.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave makes a big decision about the tour, but it blows up in his face.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave attends his first Met Gala, while Gata attends his first mental health panel.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave straddles the line between reality and fantasy as Emma's tour documentary is finally complete.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: Kirt's (probably) on a quest; Indigo's grocery gig isn't cutting it; Honeybear and Ash are all in; Camille's got flow; Winterbowl's a bust; and Janay's not here for the new guy.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: While Janay leads the search for a new winter skate spot, Kirt holds court. Indigo plays the game, and Camille has sponsorship struggles. We see you, Honeybear!

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: In exchange for a favour, Indigo helps Camille take photos; Honeybear expands her horizons; a neighbour pops into the new skate spot; Janay struggles to keep the boys in check.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: Kirt enlists Shelby on a mission; Honeybear and Camille have second thoughts; Indigo looks to make a buck by any means; Janay and Sylvester are kind of a thing?

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: Everyone's in their feelings at the squat Halloween party. Camille tries to make amends, Honeybear acts out, Janay's tired of taking it slow, and Indigo's not having any of it.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: Confessions. Breakthroughs. New beginnings. The party's over, and it's time to come home.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: While Hunt and Dorothy entertain Liddy and his wife Fran at their exclusive country club, their kids Lisa and Saint John paint a less-than-perfect portrait of the family.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.sub-title: Don't Drink The Whiskey At The Watergate

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: Reeling from the arrests at the Watergate, Hunt enlists Saint John's help to dispose of evidence, while Liddy warns the acting Attorney General that the burglaries can be tied back to President.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Beginning their search in Queensland for Meg's mum, Lucky struggles to manage his relationship back home as Meg is startled by someone who followed her from Karingunna.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: As Meg continues the search for her mum in Cairns, Lucky tries to lay low to avoid his dubious past.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Lucky and Meg head out of Cairns, but Lucky's best forgotten past catches up with him.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Trapped at the Wellfulness Commune, Lucky starts to unravel its secrets as Meg finally gets the chance to speak to her mother.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: The story of how E. Howard Hunt and G. Gordon Liddy, architects of the infamous Watergate break-in, accidentally toppled Nixon's presidency.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: While Hunt and Dorothy entertain Liddy and his wife Fran at their exclusive country club, their kids Lisa and Saint John paint a less-than-perfect portrait of the family.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.sub-title: Don't Drink The Whiskey At The Watergate
programme.desc: Hunt, Liddy, and the Cubans attempt to break into the DNC offices at the Watergate to plant listening devices for the White House.

programme.title: The White House Plumbers
programme.desc: Amid rumours of the White House's involvement, Liddy shares his concerns about Hunt's stability with John Dean and tries to make a deal. When the president resigns, lives are ruined.

programme.title: AFLW: St Kilda v Adelaide
programme.desc: Last year's Preliminary Finalists Adelaide head to RSEA Park to take on St Kilda to in Round 1 of the 2025 AFLW season.

programme.title: AFL: Western Bulldogs v Port Adelaide
programme.desc: The Bulldogs return to their home away from home in Ballarat to face the Power to kick off a monster Super Saturday.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 2001 GF BRI v ESS
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R11 2003 WC v WB
Open Mike Top 30: Dermott Brereton
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1998 R22 NM v WB
programme.desc: 1998, Round 22. The 'King' Wayne Carey is arguably the best to have ever played - and he shows us why in this game against the Dogs, in a last quarter that has to be seen to be believed.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1993 GF ESS v CAR
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2005 R22 STK v BRI
Best Games Ever: 2010 GF COL v STK
programme.desc: The 2010s - With two new teams, a drawn grand final and plenty of new talent, it was certainly a decade of spellbinding AFL football.

programme.title: AFL: Old Faces New Places: Curnow
programme.desc: 2023 R19 CAR v WCE: Before they wear their new colours for the first time, check out the best games of the top players to move teams this offseason.

programme.title: AFL: Old Faces New Places: Petraca
programme.desc: 2021 GF MEL v WB: Before they wear their new colours for the first time, check out the best games of the top players to move teams this offseason.

programme.title: AFL: Old Faces New Places: Oliver
programme.desc: 2021 R10 ADL v MEL: Before they wear their new colours for the first time, check out the best games of the top players to move teams this offseason.

programme.title: AFL: Old Faces New Places: Steele
programme.desc: 2021 R4 STK v WCE: Before they wear their new colours for the first time, check out the best games of the top players to move teams this offseason.

programme.title: AFL: Old Faces New Places: De Koning
programme.desc: 2024 R13 ESS v CAR: Before they wear their new colours for the first time, check out the best games of the top players to move teams this offseason.

programme.title: AFL: Old Faces New Places: Ugle-Hagan

programme.title: AFLW Mini: Round 3 RIC v ESS
programme.desc: Dreamtime in Darwin returns with a blockbuster clash between Essendon and Richmond to kick off AFLW Indigenous Round on Friday night.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Avery gambles on finishing a build from his past and the authorities crack down on his vehicle-filled property, while Mike finishes his '55 LaFrance Fire Truck.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths get to choose their forging method and materials. But there's a catch. Each technique comes with its own clock for the round.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Time runs short. Susan makes excuses over road sweeping, Julian Clary wields a fishing rod, and Lucy Beaumont asks Alex Horne to sit on a sled.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: This time in Victorville, Ivy takes it easy, letting Ivy Jr run the operation. Kenny feels run down, and his lack of focus lands him a locker, though there's a pleasant surprise in the end.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: With three million young drivers using the country's roads, it's a round-the-clock challenge for the Traffic Cops to keep them in check.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Cyclonic weather threatens to stop tanker driver Mick King delivering hazardous chemicals to a desert mine site.

programme.title: Swamp Mysteries With Troy Landry
programme.desc: Troy rushes to Florida to investigate reports of a Nile crocodile, one of the deadliest animals in the world; he recruits expert gator wranglers Ronnie Adams and Ashley Deadeye Jones to capture the beast.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: With three million young drivers using the country's roads, it's a round-the-clock challenge for the Traffic Cops to keep them in check.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Cyclonic weather threatens to stop tanker driver Mick King delivering hazardous chemicals to a desert mine site.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig's crew has so much wood on the landing, trucks have to back up the treacherous, muddy hill to get loaded, but road restrictions means there's chance a million dollars' worth of timber could be stranded.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: One of the first books ever printed comes into the shop, an incunable from the 15th century. Will the guys judge this worm-eaten work by its cover?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The guys are horrified that Corey has never seen Star Wars and force him to watch on company time. Will he enjoy his trip to a galaxy far far away?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit
programme.desc: It's a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Brandi and Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On her first ever solo trip, Polar rookie Steph Custance braves one of the longest ice crossings on the winter roads map. Darrell Ward attempts a triple delivery in a single day.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Cyclonic weather threatens to stop tanker driver Mick King delivering hazardous chemicals to a desert mine site.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: A comedy news show featuring humorous takes on top stories.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: At the Big Sac party Colette tries to impress Noa before his window closes. Barb's attempt to save the DMV backfires until Sally steps in.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On her first ever solo trip, Polar rookie Steph Custance braves one of the longest ice crossings on the winter roads map. Darrell Ward attempts a triple delivery in a single day.

programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.desc: Allan Border Joins Michael Vaughan, Phil Tufnell and Alastair Cook to review the second Ashes test match from Brisbane.

programme.desc: Allan Border Joins Michael Vaughan, Phil Tufnell and Alastair Cook to review the second Ashes test match from Brisbane.

How Good is Golf
programme.desc: How Good Is Golf shows you how to play, where to play and what equipment to use. Join Paul Gow as he takes you through the greatest game of all.

programme.desc: How Good Is Golf shows you how to play, where to play and what equipment to use. Join Paul Gow as he takes you through the greatest game of all.

programme.title: Golf: Getting a Round In: Dan Butler
programme.desc: Series featuring celebrities who love the game of golf.

programme.title: Golf: Getting a Round In: Dan Butler
Golf: Australian PGA: Final Round
programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.title: Golf: Australian PGA: Aus Open FR
Golf: Australian PGA: Aus Open FR
Live: Golf: Asian PGA Tour
programme.desc: First round action of the Saudi Open from the Dirab Golf and Country Club.

programme.title: Live: Golf: Asian PGA Tour
programme.desc: First round action of the Saudi Open from the Dirab Golf and Country Club.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the hills of the Dordogne, Tim and Krys are preparing to host their largest ever event; Jon and Carmen want to renovate an abandoned swimming pool.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Charles Hanson and Natasha Raskin Sharp take their vintage four-wheeler across Northumberland's quaint and idyllic neighbourhoods to find auction-worthy antiques.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Alexandra Aguilar values a jade ornament bought at a car boot sale. Geoffrey Munn uncovers a jewellery collection with rubies and diamonds dating from the 1700s.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning looks after proceedings from Newmarket Racecourse where two teams of married couples go head-to-head. John Cameron leads the reds, while Caroline Hawley takes charge of the blues.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car, leaving him bent double. Sam arrives in resus with multiple injuries.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Dyffryn Gardens in Wales, Fiona Bruce and the team discover treasures including a necklace with some of the largest pieces of Baltic amber ever seen.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The reds and blues, with the help of experts Caroline Hawley and David Harper, hunt for bargains at the Newbury Showground, but which team will invest their 300 pounds wisely?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Charles Hanson and Natasha Raskin Sharp take their vintage four-wheeler across Northumberland's quaint and idyllic neighbourhoods to find auction-worthy antiques.

programme.title: Most Expensive Christmas Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The World's Most Expensive Cruise offers exclusive access and behind-the-scenes insight aboard the most luxurious ship ever built.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton is in rural Somerset with a couple of family-focused sport enthusiasts who have a 1 million-pounds budget and a goal to buy a country home with views and a garden for football.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Nine passionate potters return, all aiming to be named top potter. They face a big main make for the smallest room in the house, a decorative hand basin.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jen bought her unique 'swiss chalet' on a bit of a whim. However it has become too much. She works full-time and the land requires an awful lot of upkeep! Can a few adjustments from Shaynna and Charlie help?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah helps a buyer make her dream move to the Lake District, touring charming village cottages and a unique mystery house.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Jon Baddeley appraises remarkable film props and memorabilia from Blade Runner while Susan Rumfitt inspects a dazzling array of diamond jewellery.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp presents from Brackley, Northamptonshire. Charles Hanson and Danny Sebastian help the teams, and Natasha finds out more about Combe Mill.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets music icon Archie Roach on the eve of his final NSW tour. Karen makes honey, chocolate and yoghurt cake. Dr Harry helps out a labrador that tugs on its lead.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Christina and Sassan transform storage into a deluxe library; Tim and Sasha create another wedding; Jon and Carmen renovate a pool.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: If you fancy living in a tropical resort, then this huge colonial-esque property might have your name on it. Sandie and Tony built the house in 2003 for their eclectic family, but now, it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Can Neale do a sensitive renovation where the spaces of this Queensland family home can creatively connect, or will Andrew find Brett and Anita something way better?

programme.title: DIY SOS The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps two entrepreneurial sisters find a Devon home for their glamping dream and visits a luxury Exmoor B&B.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Twenty-two-month-old Daisy arrives at St George's by air ambulance. The accident happened at her family's stables in Sussex and mum Georgie was so shocked she fainted at the scene.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Called out of early retirement an FBI Agent enlists his arch-nemesis, Dr Hannibal Lecter, to bring 'The Tooth Fairy' serial killer to justice.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island.

programme.title: Eight Crazy Nights
programme.desc: A judge takes pity on drunken loser Davey and offers him a choice: jail time or community service as a basketball coach. Playing ball looks like a soft option, until Davey meets up with his old ref.

programme.title: Eight Crazy Nights
programme.desc: A judge takes pity on drunken loser Davey and offers him a choice: jail time or community service as a basketball coach. Playing ball looks like a soft option, until Davey meets up with his old ref.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: Joe Morris, serving an 18-month sentence, is on the edge. Tensions with inmates threaten his release, until he meets Noel, a veteran lifer who helps him find redemption in the prison kitchen.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: Joe Morris, serving an 18-month sentence, is on the edge. Tensions with inmates threaten his release, until he meets Noel, a veteran lifer who helps him find redemption in the prison kitchen.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A recently divorced mother attempts to create a perfect Christmas for her children's first time without dad, but a series of comic mishaps threaten her best-laid plans.

programme.title: Christmas on Division Street
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Christmas on Division Street
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor 'Sully' Sullivan to recover a fortune amassed by Ferdinand Magellan, and lost 500 years ago.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Fearsome monsters Godzilla and King Kong square off in an epic battle for the ages, while humanity looks to wipe out both of the creatures and take back the planet once and for all.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A battle between two alien robot clans, the Autobots and the Decepticons, is reignited on Earth, with a teenage boy being the only one who holds the power to stop it.

programme.title: Imma Tataranni: Deputy Prosecutor
programme.desc: Imma investigates when a journalist who claimed to have dirt on a local politician turns up dead.

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: A Hell's Angel proves his loyalty to the biker club by leading a mass slaughter of their enemies. He wrestles with his conscience and searches for an exit.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: As Cathy checks into a hospice to die, the tensions between Paul and Adam boil over. Meanwhile, Sean has second thoughts about being an organ donor.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: An old flame returns and an ancient vehicle is resurrected.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires embark on a road trip from which they may never return.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: As Cathy checks into a hospice to die, the tensions between Paul and Adam boil over. Meanwhile, Sean has second thoughts about being an organ donor.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires embark on a road trip from which they may never return.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Truths about a vanishing emerge. Elsewhere, Alana grows concerned about Will's mental state; and Hannibal discloses information about Abigail to Will.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires embark on a road trip from which they may never return.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: Remember What They Took From You

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: Ladies in Black
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel by Madeleine St John, this is an alluring and tender-hearted comedy drama about the lives of a group of department store employees in 1959 Sydney.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: A couple face the terrors of adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: The Lost Tiger
programme.desc: Adopted by a wrestler kangaroo family, Teo's life changes when visions guide him to his roots. He sets off on an epic journey to save his homeland from destruction.

programme.title: The Lost Tiger
programme.desc: Adopted by a wrestler kangaroo family, Teo's life changes when visions guide him to his roots. He sets off on an epic journey to save his homeland from destruction.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside of his book, adventurous Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the book's pages and into the physical world, Harold finds he has a lot to learn about real life.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside of his book, adventurous Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the book's pages and into the physical world, Harold finds he has a lot to learn about real life.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: A Boy Called Christmas
programme.desc: In this origin story of Father Christmas, an ordinary boy sets out on an extraordinary adventure to find his father who is on a quest to discover the fabled village of Elfhelm.

programme.title: A Boy Called Christmas
programme.desc: In this origin story of Father Christmas, an ordinary boy (with a loyal pet mouse and a reindeer at his side) sets out on an extraordinary adventure to find his father who is on a quest to discover the fabled village of Elfhelm.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: It's up to the most rascally sheep in England to bring the flock home when a caravan and a very steep hill lead them all to the big city.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: When Shaun decides to take the day off and have some fun, he gets a little more action than he bargained for. A mix-up with the Farmer, a caravan, and a very steep hill leads them all to the Big City, and it's up to Shaun to return everyone safely home.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po is now living his dream as The Dragon Warrior. But his new life is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain, who plans to use a secret weapon to conquer China.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins (Reno Wilson) suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law (Danny Trejo) and other seniors as a way to make quick cash, while giving him time to still work on his next book. Eventually getting a small group to care for, Frank soon learns that these are not your typical seniors and they can't easily be corralled. With a code enforcement officer challenging the legality of his business, and his senior charges getting into all kinds of trouble, Frank's work days become anything but effortless. Featuring an all-star cast of TV's greatest stars, Grand-Daddy Day Care is a hilarious story for the young, and young at heart.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins (Reno Wilson) suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law (Danny Trejo) and other seniors as a way to make quick cash, while giving him time to still work on his next book. Eventually getting a small group to care for, Frank soon learns that these are not your typical seniors and they can't easily be corralled. With a code enforcement officer challenging the legality of his business, and his senior charges getting into all kinds of trouble, Frank's work days become anything but effortless. Featuring an all-star cast of TV's greatest stars, Grand-Daddy Day Care is a hilarious story for the young, and young at heart.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
National Security
programme.desc: Everyone wants them dead, but they might just kill each other first. Two police academy rejects are at each other's throats and on the case of a smuggler with friends in high places.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A politician's wish to change the world is heard by God, who asks him to build a modern Noah's ark. The animals and the flood arrive, along with the laughs.

programme.title: Talladega Nights
programme.desc: Racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. When a French driver challenges him for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky must face his own demons.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: When he is ruled to be property and not a person, a foul-mouthed teddy bear seeks the aid of a legendary civil rights attorney to gain the justice he deserves.
